occurrence_sentence: To address this, researchers at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc) have devised an algorithm to explicitly count the number of computing resources necessary, and optimized it to obtain [maximum efficiency](https://phys.org/tags/maximum+efficiency/), according to [Phys.org](https://phys.org/news/2020-03-optimizing-efficiency-quantum-circuits.html).

To address this, researchers at the Indian Institute of Science (IISc) have devised an algorithm to explicitly count the number of computing resources necessary, and optimized it to obtain [maximum efficiency](https://phys.org/tags/maximum+efficiency/), according to [Phys.org](https://phys.org/news/2020-03-optimizing-efficiency-quantum-circuits.html).
